name: Baked Chicken and Broccoli Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup, milk, mustard and tarragon in a bowl.
2. Stir in chicken, broccoli and green onion.
3. Spoon about 1/2 cup mixture into centre of each tortilla.
4. Fold in sides and roll up.
5. Place seam side down in a greased 12x8x1-3/4 inch baking dish (30x20x4.5cm).
6. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 15 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake 10 more minutes.
